programme.desc: While hanging out at a tea stall with friends, Jethalal and Krishnan squabble over a mispronounced word, with Krishnan flaunting his knowledge as usual.

programme.title: Shrimad Ramayan
programme.desc: Kaikeyi saves King Dasharath from certain death amidst the war. Determined to return her favour, the king offers a boon to Kaikeyi.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Tapu makes a heartfelt request to him, Salman Khan agrees to meet Popatlal. Meanwhile, Popatlal cannot wait to meet his favourite movie star.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal and friends visit a studio in the hope of meeting Salman Khan and Sohail Khan. Soon, they catch a glimpse of their stars in action.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The members of the Gokuldham society find out that Salman Khan is going to visit them. Later, they get excited to meet him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal is over the moon as Salman Khan takes a selfie with him and his friends and things take a turn for the better when Jhilmil agrees to marry him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: On Jhilmil's request, Popatlal asks Salman Khan for a selfie and explains that the future of his marriage is riding on it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the women of Gokuldham spend some time with Jhilmil, they learn more about Popatlal and his unfulfilled dreams. They then decide to help Popatlal fulfil his dreams.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal is left feeling heartbroken as Jhilmil leaves for Gaziabad. However, he still harbours hopes of marrying her someday.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Yashoda starts fasting in order to seek Lord Vishnu's attention. Later, Lord Vishnu answers Yashoda's prayers and blesses her with a child.

programme.title: Super Dancer -- Chapter 5
programme.desc: Twelve remarkable young dancers are paired with seasoned mentors to present captivating performances as they vie for the esteemed title.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal asks Inspector Pandey to drop off him, Taarak, and Sodhi at the society. Bapuji learns about Jethalal's arrest from Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal returns Babita's repaired phone, and Jethalal argues about exchanging the expensive shoes that Tapu had ordered.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Sharma family visits Taarak while Daya asks Jethalal to go to his house as soon as possible; Taarak and his friends attend a poetry conference.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents try to convince Jethalal to speak with Gulabo, but he refuses. Finally, Daya convinces him to speak to her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal receives the court's notice and approaches Taarak. They meet an advocate who looks confident and assures Jethalal that they will win the case.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal reaches the court with his family and the advocate. When Gulabo reaches the court, Jethalal's advocate tries to negotiate the matter with her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Natu Kaka creates a scene outside court as he thinks that Jethalal would lose the case. Daya and Gulabo get into a heated argument.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Unable to bear the advocate Jwala's allegations, Sodhi gets hyper and reacts aggressively. Jwala shoots a series of questions at Daya who then reveals the truth in the court.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After the lawyer twists her words to fit her narrative in court, Daya gets furious and talks rudely with the advocate, which causes Jethalal in trouble.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak proposes a plan to trick the women of Gokuldham society on April Fools' Day. When he begins to share details, his friends are filled with excitement.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali tricks Taarak into drinking healthy juice. Taarak pranks Goli. The men of Gokuldham prepare their April Fools' Day prank and party venue.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men in Gokuldham come up with fake reasons to give their wives to go the clubhouse in order to execute a prank.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men in Gokuldham attempt to enter the clubhouse secretly, but they learn that it is locked. Jethalal comes up with a plan to lure Bhide from his house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Learning that the other men are partying without him because he is single, Popatlal decides to expose the truth to their wives.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal and the ladies try to find the Gokuldham men's secret party. The event is disrupted when Champaklal unexpectedly returns to the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham men plan an April Fool's prank on the ladies and Popatlal. The ladies decide to check their husbands' drinks.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal and the ladies pretend to be intoxicated to prank the men. The Gokuldham men discuss global warming.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the festival of Raksha Bandhan approaches, the ladies of Gokuldham Society get unique rakhis to celebrate. On the other hand, Jethalal's business flourishes in the festive season.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and his entire family receive an all-expenses-paid trip to London when he sells numerous televisions of one brand. So, the Gokuldham Society members visit them to congratulate them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gada family prepares in full swing for their visit to London. On the other hand, Jethalal receives a piece of awful news that is sure to make his family unhappy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A heartbroken Jethalal contemplates how to break the news about the London trip. On the other hand, the ladies of Gokuldham Society celebrate Raksha Bandhan in full swing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finally informs his family about the cancelled London trip and sends them into a frenzy. But they unanimously make a decision that surprises Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Jethalal agrees to go to London alone, he gets loads of goods to deliver in London and a long list of items to shop from the city. Later, he throws a grand party in celebration of the occasion.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The members of Gokuldham Society give a grand farewell to Jethalal as he heads to London. But Daya faces a hard time parting from her husband.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya rushes inside the aeroplane to give Jethalal one last item before he flies to London. Later, Tapu Sena holds a meeting to discuss the preparations for Krishna Janmashtami.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Rita visits the society to share news, hoping Gogi will hear her voice. Sodhi learns of this and decides to fast until Gogi comes back.

programme.desc: Due to his lack of knowledge in English, Jethalal decides to bring Taarak along with him for the meeting with the international client.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali mentions the names of many society members that should tag along with Jethalal on his international deal. Taarak and Anjali have a dispute.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Upon seeing his boss, Taarak hides under the table. However, the foreign clients at Jethalal's shop think it is yoga and start copying him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak tries to reach home before his boss does. Jethalal asks Abdul to help Taarak, but Abdul does not know what Taarak's boss looks like.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Abdul try to occupy and keep Taarak's boss away from Gokuldham, but they fail. Jethalal and Taarak rush to his house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Hathi and his wife insist that Taarak's boss needs to take a blood test when he tries to head to Taarak's house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In a bid to buy enough time for Taarak to return home, Tapu and his friends request Taarak's boss to join them for a game of cricket.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in Gokuldham tries to prevent Taarak's boss from meeting him. However, he eventually manages to make his way to Taarak's home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal prepares a present to surprise Tapu. Bhide grows irritated due to Tapu and his friends playing cricket late at night.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu gets on Bhide's nerves when he calls Sonu inappropriately. Bhide is shocked when he catches Tapu's messages on Sonu's phone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide decides to keep a careful eye on all of Sonu's activities. He eventually finds Sonu hanging out with Tapu around town.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide hears about his friend's daughter running away with her boyfriend and starts fearing the worst for Sonu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With a new plan in mind, Taarak asks Jethalal to hand over Daya's gold jewellery to Gulabo. Daya is surprised to see Jethalal and Gulabo together in a temple.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal informs Taarak about advocate Jwala's footage and also discusses the issue with his lawyer. Jethalal's dealers are worried about their payments.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jwala wins the case for Gulabo. Daya, Champaklal and Tapu decide to stay with Gulabo.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the members in Gokuldham Society search for Jethalal after they learn he is missing. Natu Kaka and Bagha cannot find Jethalal. Tapu turns aggressive and tries to destroy Gulabo's tent.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal shocks everyone when he returns to Gokuldham Society as a hermit. He is now known as Jethanand and is accompanied by his guru, Champanand.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Champaklal is furious, a teary-eyed Daya curses Gulabo for ruining their family. All the society members urge Jethalal to stay, but he apologises to everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal decides to leave, but Gulabo stops him. Gulabo finally tells everyone that the marriage is fake and apologises to all the society members.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The members of Gokuldham Society are busy celebrating Diwali. Tappu receives a lot of money from the elders.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar comes to wish the Gada family on the occasion of Diwali. However, all is not as it seems as Sundar has something else on his mind.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar tries to convince Jethalal of his scheme, but Jethalal lies about not having enough money to finance the operation. Sundar feels disappointed and returns to Ahmedabad.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal decides to buy another house in Gokuldham Society. However, Bhide decides to sell the same house to Roshan.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshan gifts Bhide a bike as commission for his new house. Jethalal gifts a television set to Madhvi for the house deal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Roshan both give the token amounts to Bhide for the same house. Bhide is stressed when neither side decides to back out.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide finds himself in a fix about whom to sell the house to and ends up arguing with his wife in the process. Daya tries to convince Jethalal not to buy the house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide explains the entire scenario and his conflict to Mr Chandaramani. Mr Chandaramani suggests a way out of the problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is happy with Mr Chandaramani's suggestion of auctioning the flat. They wait for the owner to arrive so that the auction can begin.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the bidding continues in full swing, Jethalal and Roshan compete amongst themselves to raise a higher bid for the house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Daya informs them about the saree sale in the city, all the women plan to take their husband's permission and go shopping together for sarees.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Jethalal refuses to allow Daya to go shopping for sarees, she devises a clever plan to persuade him. Later, all the women set off together to peruse the sale on sarees.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya is shocked when she finds out the sarees she buys are defective. Meanwhile, all the women discover some defect in all the clothes they buy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya and all the women go back to return the defective sarees, but the owner rudely turns them down. Later, the women inform their husbands about the problem, but they are too busy to help.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya and others reach the police station to register a complaint against the saree store owner, but the inspector advises them to register a complaint with the consumer forum.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After failing to provide justice to them, the women decide to protest in front of the saree shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After the agitation continues for more than three hours, it broadcasts all over.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Police arrive at the spot and arrest the Gokuldham residents. Meanwhile, the store owner's wife and daughter arrive, causing the owner to get emotional and accept his mistake.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak is happy as Anjali relaxes the dietary restriction on him. It is vacation time, and the kids and the parents are all in a relaxed mood, except for Bhide.
